description: Multi-step curtain configurator (Perde Tasarla) for inanctekstil.store. Customers configure Tul curtains (width, pleat style, panel count), see a live price, and add to cart. A private Shopify App with a Cart Transform function sets the correct line item price server-side.

userStories.title: Define product metafield for max height
userStories.description: As a store admin, I want each curtain product to have a max_boy_cm metafield so the configurator can enforce per-product height limits.
acceptanceCriteria: Metafield definition created in Shopify admin: namespace 'custom', key 'max_boy_cm', type 'number_integer'
A test Tul product exists tagged 'perde-tasarla' with custom.max_boy_cm set to 270
The metafield value is readable in Liquid via product.metafields.custom.max_boy_cm
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: navigate to the test product page and confirm metafield is accessible
userStories.notes: Metafield definition created via Admin GraphQL API (gid://shopify/MetafieldDefinition/408730304593), pinned. BORNOVA Tül Perde tagged perde-tasarla with max_boy_cm=270.

userStories.title: Curtain configurator section scaffold
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Liquid section that conditionally renders on curtain products so the configurator UI can be placed in the product page without creating a new template.
acceptanceCriteria: New file technical/theme/sections/curtain-configurator.liquid created
Section renders only when product.tags contains 'perde-tasarla'; otherwise outputs nothing
When active, injects CSS that hides the standard variant-picker and buy-buttons blocks from the product-information section
Section added to technical/theme/templates/product.json above the product_recommendations section
shopify theme push --path technical/theme --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com succeeds without errors
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: test product shows empty configurator container; non-tagged product shows normal buy button
userStories.notes: Section created at technical/theme/sections/curtain-configurator.liquid. CSS hides variant-picker, .buy-buttons-block, sticky-add-to-cart on perde-tasarla products. Added to product.json above product_recommendations. Verified on unpublished theme #193719566417.

userStories.title: Step 1 — Olcu Secimi (size inputs with validation)
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to enter curtain width and height with clear constraints so I don't submit invalid measurements.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 renders inside the configurator section with two number inputs: En (cm) and Boy (cm)
En: minimum 50cm enforced; Turkish error shown if below: 'En en az 50 cm olmalidir'
Boy: maximum read from product.metafields.custom.max_boy_cm; Turkish error shown if exceeded: 'Boy en fazla [X] cm olabilir'
Devam Et button disabled until both inputs are valid
A simple measurement diagram (SVG or inline illustration) shows En and Boy labels on a curtain outline
shopify theme push --path technical/theme --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com succeeds without errors
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: enter 30cm width -> error shown; enter 200x250 -> Devam Et button enabled

userStories.title: Step 2 — Pile Stili visual picker
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to choose a pleat style by seeing a photo of each option so I understand what I'm selecting.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 2 renders after Step 1 is completed; Step 1 summary shown as collapsed row: 'Olcu: 200 x 250 cm'
Three options displayed as photo cards: Duz Dikis (ratio 2.0), Kanun Pile (ratio 2.5), Boru Pile (ratio 3.0)
Placeholder images used (grey boxes with text label) — real photos to be swapped in later
Clicking a card selects it with a visual highlight; one must be selected to proceed
Selected pleat ratio stored in JS state for price calculation
Devam Et button disabled until a style is selected
shopify theme push --path technical/theme --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com succeeds without errors
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: all three cards visible, clicking one highlights it, Devam Et enables

userStories.title: Step 3 — Kanat Secimi (panel selection)
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to select single or double panel so the correct fabric amount is calculated.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 3 renders after Step 2 is completed; Step 2 summary shown: 'Pile: Kanun Pile'
Two radio options with illustrations: Tek Kanat (1 panel) and Cift Kanat (2 panels)
Each option includes a brief Turkish description (1 sentence)
Panel count (1 or 2) stored in JS state
Devam Et button disabled until one option is selected
shopify theme push --path technical/theme --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com succeeds without errors
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: both options visible, selecting one enables Devam Et

userStories.title: Step 4 — Onay, live price, and add to cart
userStories.description: As a customer, I want to review my configuration with an accurate price estimate and accept the custom-product disclaimer before adding to cart.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 4 renders after Step 3 is completed; Step 3 summary shown: 'Kanat: Tek Kanat'
Configuration summary displayed: En, Boy, Pile Stili, Kanat
Live calculated price displayed using formula: (en_cm / 100) * pleat_ratio * panel_count * base_price_per_meter, formatted as Turkish currency (e.g. '1.695,00 TL')
Note below price: 'Tahmini fiyat. Sepette kesinlesir.'
Required disclaimer checkbox: 'Bu perde ozel olarak dikilecegi icin iade edilemez. Olculerimi kontrol ettigimi onayliyorum.'
Sepete Ekle button disabled until checkbox is checked
On click: POST to Shopify /cart/add.js with quantity 1, variant id, and properties: _en, _boy, _pile_stili, _pile_orani, _kanat
On success: Horizon cart drawer opens
On error: Turkish error message shown inline
shopify theme push --path technical/theme --store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com succeeds without errors
Verified in browser via Playwright MCP: complete full configurator flow, cart drawer opens with correct item

userStories.title: Initialize Shopify App project
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Shopify App scaffolded at technical/design-your-curtain-shopify-app/ so the Cart Transform function can be developed and deployed.
acceptanceCriteria: Shopify CLI used to create app at technical/design-your-curtain-shopify-app/
App type: custom app (not published to App Store)
shopify.app.toml configured for store 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com
Cart Transform extension scaffolded inside extensions/cart-transform/
bun run typecheck passes
bun run lint passes
README.md added with setup instructions (Partners account requirement noted, deploy command)
userStories.notes: Requires a free Shopify Partners account. Must be set up manually before this story can be completed.

userStories.title: Implement Cart Transform price calculation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Cart Transform function to read line item properties and set the correct price so customers are charged the right amount.
acceptanceCriteria: Function reads _en, _pile_orani, _kanat from line item properties
Skips items without these properties so non-curtain products are unaffected
Price formula: (en_cm / 100) * pile_orani * kanat * base_price_per_meter
Base price per meter read from lineItem.cost.amountPerQuantity.amount
Returns expand operation with corrected price
Missing or invalid properties return original price unchanged
Pure calculation logic extracted into a function with at least 3 test cases: valid config, missing properties, zero dimensions
bun run typecheck passes
bun run lint passes

userStories.title: Deploy Cart Transform and verify end-to-end
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Cart Transform deployed and installed on the store so the configurator charges the correct price at checkout.
acceptanceCriteria: shopify app deploy runs successfully from technical/design-your-curtain-shopify-app/
App installed on 1z7hb1-2d.myshopify.com
Cart Transform function active (visible in Shopify admin -> Settings -> Custom data -> Functions)
bun run typecheck passes
bun run lint passes
Verified via Playwright MCP: complete full configurator flow on test product -> cart drawer opens -> line item price matches the formula, not the base per-meter price
Verified via Playwright MCP: a non-curtain product added to cart has unaffected price
